chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI IInd Appeal No. 33 of 2021 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1.For order on CMA No.6624/25 (urgent) 2.For order on CMA No.6625/25 (u/o 23 rule 1) 3.For hearing of CMA No.841/21 4.For hearing of main case 29.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Wajid Wyne, advocate for appellant Respondent Abdul Zubaid, present in person ---------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. This application has been moved by the respondent in person for withdrawal of the appeal which is supported by his affidavit. Accordingly, this IInd Appeal is dismissed as withdrawn along with listed applications subject to all its legal consequences. J U D G E Ashraf
